title: PageSpeed Insights Optimization Skill for AI Agents
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/pagespeed-insights-optimizer.zip -o pagespeed-insights-optimizer.zip && unzip -o pagespeed-insights-optimizer.zip -d ./pagespeed-insights-optimizer

Usage:
Use this skill whenever you need measurable PSI/Lighthouse improvements while keeping UI/UX unchanged.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the PageSpeed Insights optimizer skill on this route and only propose
changes that preserve visual output and behavior."

# Required output
1) Baseline metrics (mobile + desktop): FCP, LCP, TBT, CLS, SI
2) Top bottlenecks ordered by expected impact
3) Smallest safe patch set
4) Validation rerun with before/after deltas

# Hard constraints
- No visual redesign
- No feature removal
- Keep accessibility and SEO intact
detailMarkdown:
# PageSpeed Insights Optimization Skill for AI Agents


## Usage
Use this skill whenever you need measurable PSI/Lighthouse improvements while keeping UI/UX unchanged.
